title: Bartschella tetrancistra
intro: Bartschella tetrancistra is a plant species, also known as Bartsia tetrancistra, belonging to the bartsia family (Orobanchaceae). It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Bartschella tetrancistra include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Bartschella tetrancistra is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is used to treat conditions such as coughs, colds, and respiratory issues.
taxonomy: Bartschella tetrancistra is classified within the plant family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family.
